CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: La Von Granger. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Continued To Feb-04-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Vacated

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Richard A. Friedling, Esq., appearing for plaintiff.
Order to Show Cause to Richard A. Friedling, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 8. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court finding good cause ordered the OSC off calendar and dissolved. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-03-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regular calendar this day for Mandatory Settlement Conference. Donald Casper, Esq. for defendant and Richard Friedling, Esq. for Plaintiff. Both sides stipulate to a settlement and waive involvement by Judge Dondero. Trial date is vacated. Counsel to prepare order.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
